parameters: E-Excuse me... Wait, is no one here? ...There are a lot of books here too.

Sorry for intruding, but I think I'll take a look around... About what he said, about
the Demon King... There's something to those words... I have a feeling they might be
the key to breaking through this situation...
A
"The Demon Lord's Vassal, Their True Identity" Read this journal?
yes
No
yes

If anyone is fit to write about the Demon Lord's vassals, it would be me. I am one of
the pillars granted power by the Demon Lord-sama... the monster closest to humans,
who has continued to rule the Kingdom from the shadows.

The magical power divided by the Demon Lord-sama retains immense strength even after
separating from its source. We vassals have continued our activities with that power
for a thousand years... from the day the Demon Lord-sama was slain by the hero, up
until now...

In the shadows of the Kingdom, we have continued to walk the path toward the Demon
Lord-sama's resurrection. All to ensure the flames of hatred never die out in the
Kingdom. Our ritual will be completed when the human world is filled with loathing.

The grand resurrection ritual that the Demon Lord-sama cast before losing their life.
That one's return will be achieved amidst humanity's misfortune and chaos. To
accomplish this, I infiltrated the heart of the Royal City and operated in secret as
a noble.

With the Demon Lord-sama's magical power, a perfect disguise like this was easy. Even
the descendants of the hero never noticed my true identity. Using this authority, I
continued to manipulate things so the war against monsters would drag on.

But all that ended a year ago. The Demon Lord-sama vanished from this world without a
trace. At the same time, we lost that one's power.

Having lost my power, perhaps because I had acted as a human for too long, I could no
longer return to my monster body. I became trapped in this old man's frail body...

Having lost the magical power that granted me immortality, I don't have long left. As
if to settle all accounts, illness now eats away at my body. ...Ah, am I to die like
this, as a human...

......What is this? Did that lord really write something like this? ...Could this be
true?
No
"The Demon King's Holy Body, a clue to its search" Read this journal?
yes
No
yes

...It has been a year since the Demon King vanished from this world. I am probably
the only one in the world who remembers that person. Even I will forget if I don't
reread this journal regularly.

To that extent, the magic the Demon King used was perfect. That person's entire
existence has been made to have never existed in this world... All history, from the
legend of the hero a thousand years ago to the present day, has been revised.

Why did he erase himself in such a way? I no longer have any information left to
answer that. My only clue was here in this land.

Near this remote village, which I happened to possess, one of my brethren, a
familiar, had made its dwelling... But on the very day it lost its power, it was
slain by two villagers.

...I only noticed this after those two villagers entered the Royal City and began to
stand out as S-rank adventurers at an extraordinary speed. They were exceptional to
an unbelievable degree for their age.

...Could their power be the Demon King's influence? As a result of the Demon King
trying to save them and altering everything in the world except them, two irregular
adventurers who inherited power from the world before the alteration were born...

I don't know why that person resorted to such madness. But it probably has something
to do with that witch. She was likely used as the vessel for the Demon King's
resurrection...

...Why did an emotion like wanting to help humans arise in the Demon King, who should
have been born from hatred towards people...? It's frustrating, but I can no longer
know that.........

...Anyway, I decided to visit this village. Dragging my fever-ridden body, the moment
I managed to set foot in this land, the demon blood that remained in me, even a
fragment, began to stir.

Without a doubt, the Demon King met his end in this land. His bottomless magical
power still smolders here in this village...! Perhaps his Holy Body sleeps here!

I hastily arranged to move to this village. And then, frantically, I began searching
for the place where our King sleeps. I don't have much time left... I must
hurry.........

...Now, I no longer think of destroying humanity and building an era of demons. I
just don't want to die like this. I only want to touch that person's power once more
and return to my true form...

...These two villagers... probably... are me and Mana, right...? It says that a year
ago, we defeated a demon in that cave...

And our abilities... if you think about it, they're full of strange points. I never
even thought about it until now... Since when did my sword arm feel unnaturally
light...?

Ugh... No good, I can't remember anything... But if what's written in this journal is
true...

Does that mean we were involved with that Demon King guy somehow...? Both Mana and I
have forgotten it... Could something like that really be true.........
No
"The Truth About My Successor" Read this journal?
yes
No
yes

Back when I was active as a demon, trying to make people suffer... A whim led to
action, and the result now torments me... Because of that tyrant I picked up as my
successor.........

My body is not one that can bear children with humans. Thus, for this thousand years,
I have remained in this position, changing my form. Using this noble rank to plunge
people into chaos...

But a few years ago, I had a sudden thought. To further corrupt the Royal City, I
should make even more use of this peerage. What if the Duke himself became an entity
that disrupts public order?

This idea of mine was inspired by the hedonistic private life of the current Prince
Charles. He traveled wherever his whims took him, causing trouble everywhere he went.
Even women with husbands or lovers were not spared; he repeatedly assaulted them.

I was impressed by the magnitude of the hatred that was born from this. The cuckolded
men would hate the prince for years, and the discarded women would eventually come to
resent him too.

I planned to create another such tyrant. So I went to the slums to look for a
candidate. I searched for a greedy, cruel boy with strong sexual and domineering
urges...

And that's when I met my current successor. At the time, he was one of the most hated
people even in that district. He had been caught stealing many times, and not even
women, let alone anyone else, would go near him.

I thought such a greedy man was perfect for this role. So I decided to take him in as
my adopted son. I intended to raise him as a tyrant, giving him a brutal education.

...But, well, that wasn't even necessary. From the very first day I took him in, he
assaulted a maid. Apparently, he thought it was fine since she was a woman serving
him...

Naturally, I condoned his actions. I even encouraged such behavior. I replaced all
the female attendants serving me with ones of breeding age.

To enhance his virility, I employed various devices. I mixed aphrodisiacs into his
meals. I used magic to alter his body, concentrating nutrients solely into his penis.

Within less than half a year, all the maids were pregnant. That boy is a remarkable
talent. He will surely become a wicked, tyrannical Duke surpassing even Prince
Charles...

...Just as I was getting carried away like that, the Demon Lord's power vanished. Now
everything has become meaningless. Even though there's no longer any reason to gather
people's hatred, that tyrant alone remains.

For now, that boy still acts as if he respects me. But that slum brat couldn't
possibly feel any gratitude. Eventually, I will be disposed of by him.

Whether I die of old age first or am killed by that boy first... Either way, there's
nothing I, devoid of magic, can do. All I can do is hide from him and live out my
days in obscurity.

...That boy, he was from the slums? If this is true, I can understand his arrogant
attitude. Is he constantly taking from others to show he's different from his former
self...?
No
"Search for the Demon Eye" Read this journal?
yes
No
yes

Somewhere in this village, I can sense the Demon King-sama's magical power. It must
be because the Demon King-sama used a spell to erase himself from this land. And a
fragment of that immense power still remains, not yet vanished.

The crystallization of that great one's power manifests to us in a visible form as
the Demon Eye... A terrifying demon eye that instills awe and forces submission in
those who see it... A portion of the Demon King-sama's power must still reside within
it.

If only I could reach it, I might regain my power. Somewhere in this village, the
Demon King-sama's remains... his holy body sleeps. If I could just find that, I might
be able to become a demon again.

One concern... is whether my hand can even touch the Demon King-sama, whose existence
has been erased from this world. His holy body is likely fluctuating terribly, in an
extremely unstable state.

To reach such a faint existence requires a strong bond. But all the power I once held
from the Demon King-sama has vanished. In my current state, I probably cannot touch
that great one.

...An existence other than us demons who shares a bond with the Demon King-sama...
...The Holy Mother, perhaps... ...That mage could undoubtedly reach him.

And her companion, the hero... Those two must share a strong bond with the Demon
King-sama. But they have no reason to seek the power of the Demon Eye...

To make a new Demon King reign over this world, someone with a powerful desire must
bring the Demon Eye back into this world... ...I need someone weak, starving for
power.........

...Is the lord trying to revive the Demon King's power? He's searching for someone
for that purpose... Should I just leave this be.........
No

...This journal, left open with the pages spread... was it being written just moments
ago? "Indigenous God"... ...Read this journal?
yes
No
yes

At first, I thought there was no need to bother writing about some old ancestral
faith from a village like that... but recently, the situation changed completely.

...The ancestral spirit god those villagers worship was a catalyst to gather their
prayers and fulfill an ancient curse. They used that curse magic in their
assimilation rituals with children from outside.

Their horrifying survival strategy: abduct children from other lands, raise them in
the village, make the boys work like livestock, and have the girls produce new
members for the village.

And then, to prevent them from escaping the village and returning to their homelands,
they bind them to this village with a curse and exploit them for life. That was their
method for increasing their brethren.

However, with the establishment of the Kingdom and the onset of urbanization, they
too had to join that power as a remote territory of the Kingdom, making large-scale
abductions difficult.

Thus, the rituals themselves began to be performed secretly, out of sight. At the
same time, the methods of the ritual were lost, distorted... and have now been
replaced by something with no curse-like meaning whatsoever...

...Huh!? W-wait, so then Elly...! She isn't actually cursed or anything...!?

I-if this is true! Then there's no problem taking Elly away from here! A-alright!
Then this is simple...! Let's leave this village right now────

Noble
Whoa, hold on. There's more to that story. Don't act until you've read to the end.
W-whoa!? W-when did you...!
Noble

...The curse placed on your sister unfortunately does truly exist. \n[1], read on from
there.

...However, with the Devil King-sama's fall in this land, everything changed
completely. His body came to dwell within the statue they use to worship their
ancestral spirit.

That statue was originally created by a familiar active in this area. It was modeled
after him, for the purpose of venerating Devil King-sama. That connection must have
drawn his sacred body to it.

Why the villagers are using an altar made by a familiar... Did they find the
discarded statue by chance and turn it into an altar? Or did a fellow familiar assist
their faith to spread hatred?

In any case, the ritual regained its curse through the power of the sacred body. Just
the other day, it seems an extreme curse was placed on a poor foundling girl. A curse
so strong that dispelling it is impossible for humans.........
T-this! Is this true!? Elly has been struck by a curse like this!?
Noble
...Yes. According to my investigation, it's almost certainly true.
Noble

A curse to prevent her from leaving this village, was it... As a result of being
amplified by his power, she has become a body that can never leave this land for
life.
Noble

Even a single strand of her hair would turn to dust if taken far from the village.
Your sister is bound by magic that strong. There's no longer any hope for that girl
to live a free life.

T-that can't be... So it's really true, I... I have no choice but to hope for the
Village Chief's whim to lift the curse...
Noble

No, I'm afraid that's likely impossible as well. If it were just a small community's
curse, perhaps... but a curse strengthened by Devil King-sama cannot be dispelled by
anyone.
Wha!? S-so that means, Elly is...!
Noble

A pitiful girl... Devil King-sama left her behind. In remaking the world for you and
Mana, that girl was driven to misfortune.

...! N-no... It's all my fault... Because I didn't properly think about Elly and stay
by her side.........
Noble
......... Hey, \n[1]. Will you let me help?
...W-what do you mean...?
Noble
Let me take on my lord's final, unfulfilled task. Let me help you save your sister.
...! There's a way!?
Noble

Of course...! There is a way to save your sister! But to do so... you must betray the
villagers.
........... I'm prepared... For Elly's sake, I'll do anything.........
Noble

...Let's meet in front of the assembly hall late at night, when everyone is asleep.
We'll discuss everything there.

At first, I thought there was no need to bother writing about some old ancestral
faith from that village... but recently, the situation changed completely.

...The ancestral spirit god those villagers worship was a catalyst to gather their
prayers and fulfill an ancient curse. They used that curse in the ritual of
assimilation with children from outside.

Their horrifying survival strategy: abduct children from other lands, raise them in
the village, make the boys work like livestock, and have the girls produce new
members for the village.

And to prevent them from escaping the village and returning to their homelands, they
bind them to this village with a curse, exploiting them for life. That was their
method of increasing their brethren.

However, with the establishment of the Kingdom and the progress of urbanization, they
too had to join its forces as a remote territory, making large-scale abductions
difficult.

Thus, the rituals themselves began to be performed secretly, out of sight. At the
same time, the methods of the rituals were lost and distorted... now replaced by
something with no curse-related meaning at all...

...But with the fall of the Demon Lord in this land, everything changed completely.
That being's body came to reside in the statue they worship as their ancestral
spirit.

Originally, that statue was made by a familiar active in this area―a likeness of that
being, created to worship the Demon Lord. That connection must have drawn the holy
body to it.

Why are the villagers using an altar made by a familiar...? Did they find the
discarded statue by chance and turn it into an altar? Or did a fellow familiar assist
their faith to spread hatred?

In any case, thanks to the holy body's power, the ritual regained its curse.
Recently, it seems an extreme curse was placed on a poor foundling girl... a curse so
strong that dispelling it is impossible for humans........

...I want you to let me help save your sister. If you're willing to betray the
villagers to save that girl, come to the front of that village's assembly hall late

page_condition
$gameVariables.value(113) === 10

...I don't know who is reading this. \n[1], or perhaps Mana... In any case, let me make
my excuses to you here at the end.

I never intended to make that girl unhappy. This is merely a convergence of
interests. She and I both seek power, and the means exist... That's all.

I intend to entrust everything to our new queen. If she desires the extinction of the
demon clan, I will follow even that. My wish is just one.

I do not want to rot away in this false body. I am not afraid to die. I simply do not
want to die while I am no longer myself...
